tweet: 1. #HCR will ban coverage denials for pre-existing conditions (guarantee that residents with pre-existing conditions can obtain coverage)

tweet: 2. #HCR will improve Medicare for 84,000 beneficiaries and will close the prescription drug donut hole

name: Harry Mitchell
tweet: 3. #HCR preserves Veterans’ Tricare and Veterans will not need to get other coverage

name: Harry Mitchell
tweet: 4. #HCR will allow small businesses to qualify for tax credits to provide health insurance

name: Harry Mitchell
tweet: 5. #HCR does not allow federal dollars to fund abortion or provide coverage for illegal immigrants

name: Harry Mitchell
tweet: 6. #HCR gives tax credits/assistance to up to 143,000 families and 15,700 small businesses in my district to help them afford coverage

name: Harry Mitchell
tweet: 7. #HCR saves Arizona costs in Medicaid funding and provides the state with $2.5 billion in Medicaid funds overall

name: Harry Mitchell
tweet: 8. #HCR will not dismantle the private insurance industry. It will allow insurance purchases across state lines

name: Harry Mitchell
tweet: 9. Health care reform will reduce the cost of uncompensated care for hospitals and other health care providers by $50 million annually

tweet: 10 things you should know about the #HCR bill - 10. #HCR does not contain so-called "death panels" or government takeovers of health care

tweet: Health care costs hurting economy, slowing recovery. Reform is needed. I will vote Yes on #HCR for AZ families.
